ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger survived (1 for Yes, 0 for No) */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1st, 2nd, or 3rd class) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the passenger (Male or Female) */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings or spouses aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents or children aboard */,
  "fare" REAL /* Ticket fare */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Cabin number of the passenger */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Port of embarkation */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the passenger (e.g., Mr., Mrs., Miss) */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the family */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voyages" (
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voyage */,
  "voyage_date" TEXT /* Date of the voyage */,
  "ship_name" TEXT /* Name of the ship used for the voyage */,
  "departure_port" TEXT /* Port from which the voyage departed */,
  "arrival_port" TEXT /* Port at which the voyage arrived */,
  "voyage_route" TEXT /* Route taken during the voyage */,
  "ship_type" TEXT /* Type of ship (e.g., passenger, cargo) */,
  "captain_name" TEXT /* Name of the captain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voyage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_voyages" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voyage the passenger was on */,
  "boarding_date" TEXT /* Date the passenger boarded the ship */,
  "boarding_location" TEXT /* Location where the passenger boarded the ship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id", "voyage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1st, 2nd, or 3rd class) */,
  "total_passengers" INTEGER /* Total number of passengers in this class */,
  "survivors" INTEGER /* Number of survivors from this class */,
  "survival_rate" REAL /* Calculated survival rate for this class */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Age group of the passengers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survival_statistics_total_passengers FOREIGN KEY ("total_passengers") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survival_statistics_pclass FOREIGN KEY ("pclass") REFERENCES ticket_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Range of ages for this group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class (e.g., 1st class, 2nd class) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or benefits of the class */,
  "fare_range" TEXT /* Range of fares for this class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., historical records) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., official, unofficial) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user accessing the platform */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_access ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who authored the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* Binary file containing the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES user_access ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family relationship */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "family_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the family member */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., parent, child, sibling, spouse) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_relationships_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_relationships_family_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("family_member_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cabin_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cabin allocation */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Number of the cabin allocated to the passenger */,
  "cabin_class" TEXT /* Class of the cabin (e.g., 1st class, 2nd class) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cabin_allocations_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)
